title: Vulkan-Ism
description: A modpack made with Vulkan mod to increase performance using our collection of performance increasing mods - Now bloat free!
body:
# WHAT IS VULKAN-ISM?
Vulkan-Ism is a modpack made around [Vulkan Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod) which is a **Minecraft mod that replaces Minecraft's OpenGL renderer with an optimized renderer that uses Vulkan API** to increase **Major fps boost** in gameplay.

This modpack mainly contains **performance boosting** mods that increase players fps when playing minecraft. ~~In addition, this modpack also includes quality of life mods and resource packs to elevate the minecraft gaming experience.~~

### List of mods:
<details>
<summary>Expand</summary>

1. Vulkan Mod
1. YetAnotherConfigLib
1. No Report Button
1. Cloth Config API
1. Entity Culling
1. Fabric API
1. BadOptimizations
1. Lithium
1. FerriteCore
1. Very Many Players (Fabric)
1. Modern fix
1. Lazy DFU
1. Enchanced Block Entities
1. Noisium
1. ThreadTweak

</details>

## Performance
_might be outdated and give more performance in new versions_
### World creation time


<details>
<summary>Expand</summary>

- **Vulkan-Ism:** 85 sec
- **Vulkan Mod:** 89 sec
- **Sodium:** 99 sec

</details>
